homepage.title: Precision Mechatronic Components that Integrate Motors, Gearboxes and Controls - WITTENSTEIN North America
homepage.description: Our mechatronic products include servo gearboxes, servo motors, servo regulators, sensors, software, servo actuators, servo drive systems, linear systems, custom motors for specialized applications and more.

Products - WITTENSTEIN North America
WITTENSTEIN North America
Products
Products by WITTENSTEIN North America
From the fast delivery to extensive application and technical support, our quality products include more added value than any others on the market.

alpha product lines
Our range of products and services is expanding and so we have restructured our portfolio to make it ever easier to find the right product for each specific application in the future.
alpha Basic
The entry-level class of servo actuator products with suitable solutions in the accuracy range from 10 to 20 arcmin. High-quality servo gearboxes, rapidly available at very attractive prices – and with best-in-class performance.
alpha Value
The products in the alpha Value Line are the perfect, cost-effective solution for servo axes and linear systems with mid-range requirements. These individually configurable products with an accuracy of 6 to 10 arcmin offer the widest variety of output interfaces and hence the greatest flexibility in this segment.
alpha Advanced
The servo gearboxes, actuators and linear systems in the alpha Advanced Line enable customized and industry-specific applications in the accuracy range from 1 to 5 arcmin. These products convince with high torsional rigidity and exceptionally smooth running – every one the optimal drive solution and a high-precision all-rounder at maximum speeds during both continuous and dynamic cyclic operation.
alpha Premium
The ultimate class when it comes to servo gearboxes, actuators and linear systems impresses with perfect smooth running, feed force and positioning accuracy as well as maximum power density. These products from the market leader are setting unique and previously unattainable benchmarks at accuracies of <1 arcmin as well as for compactness, modularity, lifespan and ease of installation.
